name: Broccoli with Roasted Peppers and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 5 cups broccoli florets; bite-size pieces, including stems (washed and drained)
2 large firm red bell peppers; roasted, peeled, and sliced into 1/2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli florets in 4 quarts of boiling water until barely tender, about 3 minutes. Drain in a colander and refresh under cold water, then blot dry.
2. In a 12-inch skillet, heat olive oil over low heat. Saute shallots, stirring constantly, until very lightly golden, about 2 minutes.
3. Add the broccoli florets and roasted peppers; cook until vegetables are warmed through. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Transfer to a platter and garnish with toasted pine nuts.
Note: To roast peppers, wash them in cold water, cut each into three even pieces, remove seeds, place pepper strips cut side down on a baking sheet, and broil for about 5 minutes until partially charred. Remove from the oven, wrap in paper towels, and let stand for about an hour before peeling with a small paring knife and patting dry.
